task_completion.description: Open the specified FITS file in AstroImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AstroImageJ application window is open and displaying the image 'hst_wfpc2_sample.fits'.

task_completion.description: Measure at least four blank-sky regions to find the median and standard deviation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ 'Results' or 'Measurements' table showing at least 4 rows of data corresponding to different regions, or visible selection boxes (ROIs) of roughly 30x30 to 60x60 pixels drawn on dark/blank areas of the image.

task_completion.description: Measure the brightest star in the image to obtain its peak value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A selection box (ROI) placed over the brightest star in the image, with a corresponding measurement showing the peak/maximum pixel value in the AstroImageJ Results table.

task_completion.description: Calculate the 3-sigma threshold, 5-sigma threshold, and the SNR of the brightest star.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calculator app, terminal, or text editor showing the mathematical operations for 3-sigma, 5-sigma, and SNR = (peak - background) / RMS.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated background level, RMS noise, thresholds, and SNR to the specified report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing the file saved at '~/AstroImages/measurements/sky_background_report.txt' (or the full path /home/ga/...) containing the final values for background, RMS, 3-sigma, 5-sigma, and SNR.

integrity.description: The agent used the AstroImageJ GUI to perform the measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the AstroImageJ graphical interface (image windows, ROI tools, Results tables) rather than just running a Python/shell script in the terminal to extract FITS data.

integrity.description: The values in the final report are derived from actual measurements taken during the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The background, RMS, and peak values used in the calculations and final report should match the numbers visible in the AstroImageJ Results table from earlier steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: FITS file path: /home/ga/AstroImages/raw/hst_wfpc2_sample.fits. Expected output path: /home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/sky_background_report.txt. Minimum sky regions to measure: 4. Approximate ground truth values (for reference): median ~0.0027, RMS std ~0.784, peak 3740.5.
